title: No Fire Overlay
description: Removes the annoying fire overlay that takes up your screen
body:
No fire overlay is a simple texture pack that removes the annoying fire overlay from your screen!\
This is good for people who don't like the fire takes up a third of their screen.\
This doesn't remove the fire block, it keeps that texture the same unlike some texture packs.\
![No Fire Overlay](https://i.ibb.co/hsL0ph2/2024-12-07-16-42-38.png)\
Enjoy!
